use_cases: File and folder UI components in document management systems
Animated folder opening interactions for portfolio or showcase sections
Tabbed or layered content displays with spring physics
Interactive card stacking animations in productivity apps
File browser previews with smooth open/close transitions
ai_summary: A dark-themed folder component with spring-animated pages that expand outward on click. Features three card layers with rotation and position transforms creating a 3D folder opening effect with smooth motion physics. The component uses Framer Motion's spring animations with configurable bounce, stiffness, and damping values for natural-feeling interactions.
